channel.title: ZTE Corporation — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by ZTE Corporation (zte).

item.title: CVE-2026-49002 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Broken Access Control Vulnerabily in ZTE ZXUniPOS NDS-LTE product
item.description: Access control failure means that an application does not effectively check user access permissions, so that unauthorized users can access system data beyond their permissions, such as viewing and modifying configuration information.

item.title: CVE-2026-49001 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in ZTE ZXUniPOS NDS-LTE product
item.description: Cross-site request forgery (CSRF) vulnerabilities allow attackers to exploit a user's authenticated session to forge cross-site requests, inducing the execution of unintended operations such as tampering with configuration data.

item.title: CVE-2026-49000 · 7 HIGH 🌩️ — Cryptography Implementation Flaw vulnerability in ZTE ZXUniPOS NDS-LTE product
item.description: An insecure password scheme refers to vulnerabilities arising from improper selection of encryption algorithms, inadequate key management, or flawed code implementation, which may lead to data leakage or tampering, such as hard-coded keys or the use…

item.title: CVE-2026-48999 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in ZTE ZXUniPOS NDS-LTE product
item.description: Attackers carefully craft malicious scripts, such as JavaScript, and inject them into target systems; when other users access pages containing such malicious content, the scripts are automatically loaded and executed in the victim's browser.Attackers…

item.title: CVE-2026-44410 · 3.8 LOW — Function Abusement Vulnerability in ZTE ZXUniPOS NDS-LTE
item.description: This vulnerability stems from a business logic flaw.Attackers can exploit legitimate application functions in unintended and abnormal ways, deviating from the designer's expectations, to carry out malicious attacks.

item.title: CVE-2026-44409 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Information disclosure vulnerability in ZTE MU5250
item.description: There is an an information disclosure vulnerability in ZTE MU5250. Due to improper configuration of the access control mechanism, attackers can obtain information without authorization, causing the risk of information disclosure.

item.title: CVE-2026-44408 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Unauthorized access vulnerability in ZTE MU5250
item.description: There is an unauthorized access vulnerability in ZTE MU5250. Due to improper permission control of the Web interface, an unauthorized attacker can modify configuration through the interface.

item.title: CVE-2026-44407 · 4.7 MEDIUM — Remote Denial of Service Vulnerability Exists in ZTE Cloud PC Client uSmartview
item.description: A remote denial-of-service vulnerability exists in the ZTE Cloud PC client uSmartview, which may lead to memory corruption and remote denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2026-44406 · 5.7 MEDIUM — DLL Hijacking Vulnerability in ZTE Cloud PC Client uSmartview
item.description: ZTE Cloud PC client uSmartView contains a DLL hijacking vulnerability; since uSmartViewServiceAgent.exe runs with SYSTEM privileges, successful hijacking enables local arbitrary code execution, privilege escalation, and memory corruption.contains a D…

item.title: CVE-2026-40004 · 5.5 MEDIUM — openssl.cnf Privilege Escalation Vulnerability in ZTE Cloud PC Client uSmartview
item.description: There exists an openssl.cnf privilege escalation vulnerability in ZTE Cloud PC client uSmartview. An attacker can execute arbitrary code locally and escalate privileges.

item.title: CVE-2026-40003 · 5.1 MEDIUM — USB-based arbitrary memory write vulnerability in ZTE ZX297520V3 soc BootROM
item.description: ZTE ZX297520V3 BootROM contains a vulnerability that allows arbitrary memory writes via USB. Attackers can exploit the lack of target address validation in the USB download mode to write data to any location in BootROM runtime memory, thereby overwri…

item.title: CVE-2026-40001 · 5.2 MEDIUM — Local privilege escalation vulnerability in ZTE PROCESS Guard service of the cloud computer client
item.description: There is a local privilege escalation vulnerability in the ZTE PROCESS Guard service of the cloud computer client, which may allow local arbitrary code execution, privilege escalation and path traversal bypass.

item.title: CVE-2026-40002 · 5 MEDIUM — ZTE Red Magic 11 Pro (NX809J) contains a vulnerability that allows non-privileged applications to trigger sensitive operations.
item.description: Red Magic 11 Pro (NX809J) contains a vulnerability that allows non-privileged applications to trigger sensitive operations. The vulnerability stems from the lack of validation for applications accessing the service interface. Exploiting this vulnerab…

item.title: CVE-2026-40436 · 7.1 HIGH — ZTE ZXEDM iEMS product has a password reset vulnerability
item.description: The ZTE ZXEDM iEMS product has a password reset vulnerability for any user.Because the management of the cloud EMS portal does not properly control access to the user list acquisition function, attackers can read all user list information through the…

item.title: CVE-2025-66315 · 4.3 MEDIUM — ZTE MF258K Pro Version Server has a Configuration Defect Vulnerability
item.description: There is a configuration defect vulnerability in the version server of ZTE MF258K Pro products. Due to improper directory permission settings, an attacker can execute write permissions in a specific directory.

item.title: CVE-2025-66314 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Improper Privilege Management vulnerability in ZTE ElasticNet UME R32 on Linux allows Accessing Functionality Not Properly Constrained by ACLs.This issue affects ElasticNet UME R32: ElasticNet_UME_R32_V16.23.20.04.

item.title: CVE-2025-46583 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — DOS Vulnerability in ZTE MC889A Pro product
item.description: There is a Denial of Service（DoS）vulnerability in the ZTE MC889A Pro product. Due to insufficient validation of the input parameters of the Short Message Service interface, allowing an attacker to exploit it to carry out a DoS attack.

item.title: CVE-2025-46582 · 7.7 HIGH — Private Key Disclosure Vulnerability in ZTE ZXMP M721 Product
item.description: A private key disclosure vulnerability exists in ZTE's ZXMP M721 product. A low-privileged user can bypass authorization checks to view the device's communication private key, resulting in key exposure and impacting communication security.

item.title: CVE-2025-46581 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — ZTE ZXCDN product has a Struts RCE Vulnerability
item.description: ZTE's ZXCDN product is affected by a Struts remote code execution (RCE) vulnerability. An unauthenticated attacker can remotely execute commands with non-root privileges.

item.title: CVE-2025-26711 · 5.7 MEDIUM
item.description: There is an unauthorized access vulnerability in ZTE T5400. Due to improper permission control of the Web module interface, an unauthorized attacker can obtain sensitive information through the interface.

item.title: CVE-2025-26710 · 3.5 LOW
item.description: There is an an information disclosure vulnerability in ZTE T5400. Due to improper configuration of the access control mechanism, attackers can obtain information through interfaces without authorization, causing the risk of information disclosure.

item.title: CVE-2025-26709 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Unauthorized Access Vulnerability in ZTE F50
item.description: There is an unauthorized access vulnerability in ZTE F50. Due to improper permission control of the Web module interface, an unauthorized attacker can obtain sensitive information through the interface

item.title: CVE-2025-46580 · 7.7 HIGH — ZTE GoldenDB Database product has a code-related vulnerability
item.description: There is a code-related vulnerability in the GoldenDB database product. Attackers can access system tables to disrupt the normal operation of business SQL.

item.title: CVE-2025-46579 · 8.4 HIGH — ZTE GoldenDB Database product has a DDE injection vulnerability
item.description: There is a DDE injection vulnerability in the GoldenDB database product. Attackers can inject DDE expressions through the interface, and when users download and open the affected file, the DDE commands can be executed.

item.title: CVE-2025-46578 · 6.5 MEDIUM — ZTE GoldenDB Database product has SQL injection vulnerabilities in multiple interfaces
item.description: There are SQL injection vulnerabilities in multiple interfaces of the GoldenDB database product. Attackers can exploit these interfaces to inject commands and extract sensitive database information.

item.title: CVE-2025-46577 · 6.5 MEDIUM — ZTE GoldenDB Database product has an SQL injection vulnerability
item.description: There is a SQL injection vulnerability in the GoldenDB database product. Attackers can inject commands to extract database information.

item.title: CVE-2025-46576 · 5.4 MEDIUM — ZTE GoldenDB Database product has a privilege escalation vulnerability
item.description: There is a Permission Management and Access Control vulnerability in the GoldenDB database product. Attackers can manipulate requests to bypass privilege restrictions and delete content.

item.title: CVE-2025-46575 · 4.9 MEDIUM — ZTE GoldenDB Database product has an information disclosure vulnerability
item.description: There is an information disclosure vulnerability in the GoldenDB database product. Attackers can exploit error messages to obtain the system's sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2025-46574 · 4.1 MEDIUM — ZTE GoldenDB Database product has an input validation vulnerability
item.description: There is an information disclosure vulnerability in the GoldenDB database product. Attackers can exploit error messages to obtain the system's sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2025-26702 · 4.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper Input Validation vulnerability in ZTE GoldenDB allows Input Data Manipulation.This issue affects GoldenDB: from 6.1.03 through 6.1.03.04.

item.title: CVE-2025-26703 · 4.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper Privilege Management vulnerability in ZTE GoldenDB allows Privilege Escalation.This issue affects GoldenDB: from 6.1.03 through 6.1.03.04.

item.title: CVE-2025-26704 · 6.4 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper Privilege Management vulnerability in ZTE GoldenDB allows Privilege Escalation.This issue affects GoldenDB: from 6.1.03 through 6.1.03.05.

item.title: CVE-2025-26705 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Improper Privilege Management vulnerability in ZTE GoldenDB allows Privilege Escalation.This issue affects GoldenDB: from 6.1.03 through 6.1.03.05.

item.title: CVE-2025-26706 · 5.4 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper Privilege Management vulnerability in ZTE GoldenDB allows Privilege Escalation.This issue affects GoldenDB: from 6.1.03 through 6.1.03.07.

item.title: CVE-2025-26707 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Improper Privilege Management vulnerability in ZTE GoldenDB allows Privilege Escalation.This issue affects GoldenDB: from 6.1.03 through 6.1.03.05.

item.title: CVE-2025-26708 · 4.2 MEDIUM — ZTELink has a configuration defect vulnerability
item.description: There is a configuration defect vulnerability in ZTELink 5.4.9 for iOS. This vulnerability is caused by a flaw in the WiFi parameter configuration of the ZTELink. An attacker can obtain unauthorized access to the WiFi service.

item.title: CVE-2024-22063 · 7.6 HIGH — ZTE ZENIC ONE R58 product has a CSV injection vulnerability
item.description: The ZENIC ONE R58 products by ZTE Corporation have a command injection vulnerability. An authenticated attacker can exploit this vulnerability to tamper with messages, inject malicious code, and subsequently launch attacks on related devices.

item.title: CVE-2024-22067 · 6.8 MEDIUM — ZTE NH8091 product has an improper permission control vulnerability
item.description: ZTE NH8091 product has an improper permission control vulnerability. Due to improper permission control of the Web module interface, an authenticated attacker may exploit the vulnerability to execute arbitrary commands.

item.title: CVE-2024-22066 · 7.5 HIGH
item.description: There is a privilege escalation vulnerability in ZTE ZXR10 ZSR V2 intelligent multi service router . An authenticated attacker could use the vulnerability to obtain sensitive information about the device.

item.title: CVE-2024-22065 · 6.8 MEDIUM — ZTE MF258 Pro product has a OS Command injection vulnerability
item.description: There is a command injection vulnerability in ZTE MF258 Pro product. Due to insufficient validation of Ping Diagnosis interface parameter, an authenticated attacker could use the vulnerability to execute arbitrary commands.

item.title: CVE-2024-22068 · 6 MEDIUM — Weak Password Vulnerability in ZTE ZSR V2 Intelligent Multi Service Router
item.description: Improper Privilege Management vulnerability in ZTE ZXR10 1800-2S series ,ZXR10 2800-4,ZXR10 3800-8,ZXR10 160 series on 64 bit allows Functionality Bypass.This issue affects ZXR10 1800-2S series ,ZXR10 2800-4,ZXR10 3800-8,ZXR10 160 series: V4.00.10 an…

item.title: CVE-2022-39068 · 4.5 MEDIUM — Buffer Overflow Vulnerability in ZTE MF296R
item.description: There is a buffer overflow vulnerability in ZTE MF296R. Due to insufficient validation of the SMS parameter length, an authenticated attacker could use the vulnerability to perform a denial of service attack.

item.title: CVE-2024-22069 · 7.1 HIGH — Permission and Access Control Vulnerability in ZXV10 XT802/ET301
item.description: There is a permission and access control vulnerability of ZTE's ZXV10 XT802/ET301 product.Attackers with common permissions can log in the terminal web and change the password of the administrator illegally by intercepting requests to change the pass…

item.title: CVE-2024-22062 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Permissions and Access Control Vulnerability in ZTE ZXCLOUD IRAI
item.description: There is a permissions and access control vulnerability in ZXCLOUD IRAI.An attacker can elevate non-administrator permissions to administrator permissions by modifying the configuration.

item.title: CVE-2023-25646 · 7.1 HIGH — Permission and Access Control Vulnerability in ZTE H388X
item.description: There is an unauthorized access vulnerability in ZTE H388X. If H388X is caused by brute-force serial port cracking,attackers with common user permissions can use this vulnerability to obtain elevated permissions on the affected device by performing s…

item.title: CVE-2024-22064 · 8.3 HIGH — Configuration error Vulnerability in ZTE ZXUN-ePDG
item.description: ZTE ZXUN-ePDG product, which serves as the network node of the VoWifi system, under by default configuration, uses a set of non-unique cryptographic keys during establishing a secure connection(IKE) with the mobile devices connecting over the interne…

item.title: CVE-2023-41781 · 5.7 MEDIUM — XSS Vulnerability in ZTE MF258 Products
item.description: There is a Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in ZTE MF258. Due to insufficient input validation of SMS interface parameter, an XSS attack will be triggered.

item.title: CVE-2023-41782 · 3.9 LOW — DLL Hijacking Vulnerability in ZTE ZXCLOUD iRAI
item.description: There is a DLL hijacking vulnerability in ZTE ZXCLOUD iRAI, an attacker could place a fake DLL file in a specific directory and successfully exploit this vulnerability to execute malicious code.

item.title: CVE-2023-41784 · 6.6 MEDIUM — Permissions and Access Control Vulnerability in ZTE Red Magic 8 Pro
item.description: Permissions and Access Control Vulnerability in ZTE Red Magic 8 Pro

item.title: CVE-2023-41783 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Command Injection Vulnerability of ZTE's ZXCLOUD iRAI
item.description: There is a command injection vulnerability of ZTE's ZXCLOUD iRAI. Due to the program failed to adequately validate the user's input, an attacker could exploit this vulnerability to escalate local privileges.
